title: 固化 Make 输出跨平台测试语义

sources.reason: CI portability test and explanatory semantic assertion comment.

riskAssessment.reason: The test must document and enforce semantic parsing across Make output formats.

executionDecision.reason: The test behavior and portability requirement are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Verify the comment and semantic matcher preserve the no-active policy assertions.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The CI portability rationale is documented next to the semantic branch assertion.
The focused Makefile test and complete quality suite pass.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The prior CI fix needs a durable explanation because Make implementations differ in dry-run indentation.
constraints: Do not change Make behavior or weaken assertions.
intent.rationale: A local comment makes the portability invariant legible to future maintainers and creates complete ownership evidence for the CI fix.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The no-active branch test passes with current Make output.
The test retains read-only and PR gate assertions.
The comment documents the cross-platform output constraint without runtime changes.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
